context.audience: Ruby developers building full-stack web applications, startup founders using Rails for rapid MVP development, experienced developers maintaining mature Rails codebases
pain_points: Modernizing Rails frontends with Hotwire, Turbo, and Stimulus vs adopting an SPA
Scaling Rails applications beyond the monolith with horizontal scaling and background jobs
Integrating LLM APIs into the Rails MVC pattern and Active Job pipelines
Keeping up with Rails 8 features like Kamal deployment and Solid Queue
Testing strategies for complex Rails applications with system tests and factories
monetization: Freelance and consultancy for Rails applications
